emails.subject: Execution of Deutsche Bank (Frost) Agreement
emails.body: Execution of Deutsche Bank (Frost) Agreement Hi Stephanie, I thought the execution process was complete on this one but actually we are still in the process of executing. DBAB has sent to us two copies signed by them and hence, ready for our signatures. I am forwarding to you so that you could get the signatures and prepare the Authorized Officers List and the Consent Form for signatures as well. Cassandra wants an explanatory blurb about why the account is necessary, please check in to get some justification from Aneela, Sheila or Theresa. Thank you, Cheryl Nelson Senior Counsel EB3816 (713) 345-4693

emails.subject: Re: Execution of Deutsche Bank (Frost) Agreement
emails.body: Re: Execution of Deutsche Bank (Frost) Agreement Which entity is this agreement for? It does not indicate on the agreement. Thanks Cheryl Nelson Sent by: Cheryl Nelson 03/29/2001 11:04 AM

emails.subject: Re: Execution of Deutsche Bank (Frost) Agreement
emails.body: Stephanie, I left Terry, the attorney a note asking him to confirm that he sent us BOTH agreements one for ENA and one for ECT since it appears that he did not. I will keep you posted. Cheryl Nelson Senior Counsel EB3816 (713) 345-4693 Forwarded by Cheryl Nelson/NA/Enron on 04/03/2001 01:23 PM Cheryl Nelson Sent by: Cheryl Nelson 04/03/2001 01:22 PM
